description_long: This is a large, single-story bungalow set within a spacious, fenced compound featuring manicured lawns and multiple paved walkways. The main building has a prominent, dark hip roof with a cross at the front, suggesting a possible religious or community function. The facade includes large arched windows and a covered front porch supported by columns. The grounds are landscaped with several gazebos, garden features, and what appears to be a parking area and auxiliary structures. The perimeter is enclosed by a low fence with regularly spaced pillars, and the property is organized with clear zones for recreation, entry, and utility. The overall design is symmetrical and formal, with a focus on accessibility and open green space.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, arched windows, and a covered front porch, set in a landscaped, fenced compound with gazebos and garden features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large arched windows, and the cross on the roof, with landscaped lawns and gazebos visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the expansive roof, rear garden features, and auxiliary structures, with the parking area more visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, auxiliary building, and fenced perimeter, with less emphasis on the main entrance.
description_view_3: Side angled view showing the side windows, garden features, and the arrangement of gazebos and walkways within the compound.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing arched windows with grouped side windows
